```text
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4 flex items-start gap-3">
                        <InformationCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
                            This summary is generated from your recorded medical data to help you understand your health history.
                            It is not a medical diagnosis. Always consult your doctor for medical advice.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
};
export default AIHealthSummary;
```

## National_Vitality_Eye/Client/src/pages/PatientPortal/AIReminders.jsx

```text
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
    ArrowLeftIcon, BellAlertIcon, CalendarDaysIcon,
    BeakerIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ExclamationTriangleIcon,
    ArrowPathIcon, ClockIcon, InformationCircleIcon
} from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
const PORTAL_API = 'http://localhost:5000/api/patient';
const statusStyle = (s) => ({
    OVERDUE:  { bg: 'bg-red-50 border-red-200',    badge: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',    icon: ExclamationTriangleIcon, iconColor: 'text-red-600' },
    SOON:     { bg: 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200', badge: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700', icon: ClockIcon,              iconColor: 'text-amber-600' },
    UPCOMING: { bg: 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200',   badge: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',   icon: CalendarDaysIcon,       iconColor: 'text-blue-600' },
}[s] || { bg: 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200', badge: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600', icon: CalendarDaysIcon, iconColor: 'text-gray-500' });
const formatDays = (days) => {
    if (days < 0) return `${Math.abs(days)} day${Math.abs(days) !== 1 ? 's' : ''} overdue`;
    if (days === 0) return 'Today';
    if (days === 1) return 'Tomorrow';
    return `In ${days} days`;
};
const AIReminders = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [data, setData] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('followups');
    useEffect(() => { load(); }, []);
    const load = async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const token = localStorage.getItem('patientToken');
            if (!token) { navigate('/patient/login'); return; }
            const res = await fetch(`${PORTAL_API}/ai/reminders`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });
            const d = await res.json();
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error(d.error);
            setData(d);
        } catch { toast.error('Could not load your reminders.'); }
        finally { setLoading(false); }
    };
    if (loading) return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
            <div className="text-center">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-blue-200 border-t-blue-600 rounded-full animate-spin mx-auto mb-3" />
                <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Loading your reminders...</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
            <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-10">
                <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <button onClick={() => navigate('/patient/dashboard')} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
                            <ArrowLeftIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-600" />
                        </button>
                        <div>
                            <h1 className="font-bold text-gray-900">Reminders</h1>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Follow-up appointments and medications</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <button onClick={load} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
                        <ArrowPathIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-500" />
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-6 space-y-4">
                {}
                {data?.urgentMessage && (
                    <div className={`rounded-xl border p-4 flex items-center gap-3 ${data.overdueCount > 0 ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-200' : 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200'}`}>
                        <ExclamationTriangleIcon className={`h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 ${data.overdueCount > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-amber-600'}`} />
                        <p className={`font-semibold text-sm ${data.overdueCount > 0 ? 'text-red-800' : 'text-amber-800'}`}>{data.urgentMessage}</p>
                    </div>
                )}
                {}
                <div className="flex gap-2 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-1">
                    {[
                        { key: 'followups',   label: `Follow-ups (${data?.followUps?.length || 0})` },
                        { key: 'medications', label: `Medications (${data?.medications?.length || 0})` }
                    ].map(tab => (
                        <button key={tab.key} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
                            className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
                                activeTab === tab.key ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                            }`}>
                            {tab.label}
                        </button>
                    ))}
                </div>
                {}
                {activeTab === 'followups' && (
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                        {data?.followUps?.length > 0 ? data.followUps.map((f, i) => {
                            const s = statusStyle(f.status);
                            const Icon = s.icon;
                            return (
                                <div key={i} className={`rounded-xl border p-4 ${s.bg}`}>
                                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 mb-3">
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                            <Icon className={`h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 ${s.iconColor}`} />
                                            <div>
                                                <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm">{f.forCondition}</p>
                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{f.provider}</p>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium flex-shrink-0 ${s.badge}`}>{f.status}</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-3">
                                        <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3 border border-white">
                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Appointment Date</p>
                                            <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm">
                                                {new Date(f.date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3 border border-white">
                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Time Until</p>
                                            <p className={`font-semibold text-sm ${f.daysUntil < 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{formatDays(f.daysUntil)}</p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    {f.instructions && (
                                        <div className="flex items-start gap-2 bg-white/60 rounded-lg p-3 border border-white">
                                            <InformationCircleIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                                            <p className="text-xs text-blue-700">{f.instructions}</p>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                            );
                        }) : (
                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-8 text-center">
                                <CheckCircleIcon className="h-10 w-10 text-emerald-400 mx-auto mb-2" />
                                <p className="font-semibold text-gray-700">No follow-up appointments</p>
                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Follow-up reminders will appear here when your doctor schedules them</p>
                            </div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                )}
                {}
                {activeTab === 'medications' && (
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                        {data?.medications?.length > 0 ? (
                            <>
                                <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-xl p-4 flex items-start gap-3">
                                    <InformationCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                                    <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 leading-relaxed">
                                        These medications were prescribed across your recent visits. Always follow your doctor's instructions and do not stop or change medications without consulting your healthcare provider.
                                    </p>
                                </div>
                                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                    {data.medications.map((med, i) => (
                                        <div key={i} className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4 hover:border-blue-300 transition-colors">
                                            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                                                <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-blue-50 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                                                    <BeakerIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="min-w-0">
                                                    <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm truncate">{med.name}</p>
                                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">For: {med.forCondition}</p>
                                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-0.5">
                                                        Prescribed: {new Date(med.prescribedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })}
                                                    </p>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    ))}
                                </div>
                            </>
                        ) : (
                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-8 text-center">
                                <BeakerIcon className="h-10 w-10 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-2" />
                                <p className="font-semibold text-gray-700">No medications on record</p>
                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Prescribed medications will appear here after your visits</p>
                            </div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                )}
                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4 flex items-start gap-3">
                    <InformationCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
                        Reminders are extracted from your medical records. Always contact your clinic directly to confirm or reschedule appointments.
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
export default AIReminders;
```

## National_Vitality_Eye/Client/src/pages/PatientPortal/AISymptomChecker.jsx

```text
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
    ArrowLeftIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon, ExclamationTriangleIcon,
    CheckCircleIcon, XMarkIcon, SparklesIcon, InformationCircleIcon,
    ClockIcon, ShieldExclamationIcon
} from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
const PORTAL_API = 'http://localhost:5000/api/patient';
const COMMON_SYMPTOMS = [
    'fever', 'headache', 'cough', 'fatigue', 'nausea', 'vomiting',
    'diarrhoea', 'stomach pain', 'chest pain', 'difficulty breathing',
    'dizziness', 'rash', 'joint pain', 'muscle pain', 'sore throat',
    'runny nose', 'loss of appetite', 'sweating', 'chills', 'back pain',
    'blurred vision', 'swollen feet', 'weight loss', 'night sweats'
];
const urgencyConfig = {
    EMERGENCY: {
        bg: 'bg-red-50 border-red-300',
        text: 'text-red-700',
        badge: 'bg-red-600 text-white',
        icon: ExclamationTriangleIcon,
        label: 'Seek Emergency Care Immediately'
    },
    URGENT: {
        bg: 'bg-orange-50 border-orange-300',
        text: 'text-orange-700',
        badge: 'bg-orange-500 text-white',
        icon: ShieldExclamationIcon,
        label: 'See a Doctor Today'
    },
    SOON: {
        bg: 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200',
        text: 'text-amber-700',
        badge: 'bg-amber-500 text-white',
        icon: ClockIcon,
        label: 'Schedule an Appointment Soon'
    },
    MONITOR: {
        bg: 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200',
        text: 'text-blue-700',
        badge: 'bg-blue-500 text-white',
        icon: CheckCircleIcon,
        label: 'Monitor Your Symptoms'
    }
};
const AISymptomChecker = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [symptoms, setSymptoms] = useState([]);
    const [input, setInput] = useState('');
    const [result, setResult] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const addSymptom = (s) => {
        const clean = s.trim().toLowerCase();
        if (clean && !symptoms.includes(clean)) setSymptoms(prev => [...prev, clean]);
        setInput('');
    };
    const check = async () => {
        if (symptoms.length === 0) { toast.error('Please add at least one symptom'); return; }
        setLoading(true);
        setResult(null);
        try {
            const token = localStorage.getItem('patientToken');
            if (!token) { navigate('/patient/login'); return; }
            const res = await fetch(`${PORTAL_API}/ai/symptom-check`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
                body: JSON.stringify({ symptoms })
            });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error);
            setResult(data);
        } catch { toast.error('Could not complete the symptom check.'); }
        finally { setLoading(false); }
    };
    const cfg = result ? (urgencyConfig[result.urgencyLevel] || urgencyConfig.MONITOR) : null;
    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
            <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-10">
                <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex items-center gap-3">
                    <button onClick={() => navigate('/patient/dashboard')} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
                        <ArrowLeftIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-600" />
                    </button>
                    <div>
                        <h1 className="font-bold text-gray-900">Symptom Checker</h1>
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Get guidance on when to seek care</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-6 space-y-4">
                {}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-5">
                    <h2 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">What symptoms are you experiencing?</h2>
                    {}
                    <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
                        <input
                            type="text"
                            value={input}
                            onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)}
                            onKeyDown={e => e.key === 'Enter' && addSymptom(input)}
                            placeholder="Type a symptom and press Enter..."
                            className="flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
                        />
                        <button
                            onClick={() => addSymptom(input)}
                            className="px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg bg-blue-600 text-white text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
                        >
                            Add
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    {}
                    {symptoms.length > 0 && (
                        <div className="mb-4">
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Your symptoms:</p>
                            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                                {symptoms.map(s => (
                                    <span key={s} className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 text-blue-700 text-sm">
                                        {s}
                                        <button onClick={() => setSymptoms(prev => prev.filter(x => x !== s))} className="hover:text-blue-900 transition-colors">
                                            <XMarkIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                                        </button>
                                    </span>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                    {}
                    <div>
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Common symptoms — tap to add:</p>
                        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                            {COMMON_SYMPTOMS.filter(s => !symptoms.includes(s)).slice(0, 16).map(s => (
                                <button key={s} onClick={() => addSymptom(s)}
                                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 text-xs hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors">
                                    {s}
                                </button>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <button
                        onClick={check}
                        disabled={loading || symptoms.length === 0}
                        className="mt-5 w-full py-3 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-sm"
                    >
                        {loading ? (
                            <><div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white/30 rounded-full animate-spin border-t-white" /> Checking...</>
                        ) : (
                            <><SparklesIcon className="h-4 w-4" /> Check My Symptoms</>
                        )}
                    </button>
                </div>
                {}
                {result && cfg && (
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                        {}
                        <div className={`rounded-2xl border p-5 ${cfg.bg}`}>
                            <div className="flex items-start gap-3 mb-4">
                                <cfg.icon className={`h-6 w-6 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 ${cfg.text}`} />
                                <div>
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap mb-1">
                                        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold ${cfg.badge}`}>{result.urgencyLevel}</span>
                                        <span className={`text-xs font-medium ${cfg.text}`}>{result.timeframe}</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <h2 className={`font-bold text-base ${cfg.text}`}>{cfg.label}</h2>
                                    <p className={`text-sm mt-1 ${cfg.text} opacity-80`}>{result.careAdvice}</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            {result.emergencySymptoms?.length > 0 && (
                                <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3 border border-red-200">
                                    <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-700 mb-2">Emergency symptoms detected:</p>
                                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                                        {result.emergencySymptoms.map((s, i) => (
                                            <span key={i} className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-red-100 text-red-700 font-medium">{s}</span>
                                        ))}
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            )}
                        </div>
                        {}
                        {result.selfCareTips?.length > 0 && (
                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4">
                                <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <CheckCircleIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-500" />
                                    Self-care tips
                                </h3>
                                <ul className="space-y-2">
                                    {result.selfCareTips.map((tip, i) => (
                                        <li key={i} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                                            <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-1.5" />
                                            {tip}
                                        </li>
                                    ))}
                                </ul>
                            </div>
                        )}
                        {}
                        {result.aiPredictions?.length > 0 && (
                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4">
                                <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm mb-1 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <SparklesIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-purple-500" />
                                    Conditions with similar patterns
                                </h3>
                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-3">For awareness only — not a diagnosis.</p>
                                <div className="space-y-3">
                                    {result.aiPredictions.map((p, i) => (
                                        <div key={i} className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                            <div>
                                                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{p.condition}</p>
                                                {p.commonIn && <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{p.commonIn}</p>}
                                            </div>
                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-4">
                                                <div className="w-20 bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-1.5 overflow-hidden">
                                                    <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-purple-500" style={{ width: `${Math.min(p.likelihood, 100)}%` }} />
                                                </div>
                                                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 w-8 text-right">{Math.round(p.likelihood)}%</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    ))}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        )}
                        {}
                        <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4 flex items-start gap-3">
                            <InformationCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">{result.disclaimer}</p>
                        </div>
                        <button onClick={() => { setResult(null); setSymptoms([]); }}
                            className="w-full py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors text-sm font-medium">
                            Check different symptoms
                        </button>
                    </div>
                )}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
export default AISymptomChecker;
```

## National_Vitality_Eye/Client/src/pages/PatientPortal/AIVitalsInsights.jsx

```text
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
    ArrowLeftIcon, HeartIcon, ExclamationTriangleIcon,
    CheckCircleIcon, ArrowPathIcon, InformationCircleIcon,
    ShieldExclamationIcon
} from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import { LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
const PORTAL_API = 'http://localhost:5000/api/patient';
const severityStyle = (s) => ({
    HIGH:     { bg: 'bg-red-50 border-red-200',    badge: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',    text: 'text-red-700' },
    MODERATE: { bg: 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200', badge: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700', text: 'text-amber-700' },
}[s] || { bg: 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200', badge: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600', text: 'text-gray-600' });
const trendStyle = (t) => ({
    IMPROVING: { bg: 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200', badge: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700', line: '#10b981', icon: '↑' },
    STABLE:    { bg: 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200',       badge: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',       line: '#3b82f6', icon: '→' },
    WORSENING: { bg: 'bg-orange-50 border-orange-200',   badge: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700',   line: '#f97316', icon: '↓' },
    CHANGING:  { bg: 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200',     badge: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',     line: '#f59e0b', icon: '~' },
}[t] || { bg: 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200', badge: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600', line: '#9ca3af', icon: '?' });
const tooltipStyle = {
    contentStyle: { backgroundColor: '#fff', border: '1px solid #e5e7eb', borderRadius: '8px', fontSize: '12px' },
    itemStyle: { color: '#374151' }
};
const AIVitalsInsights = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [anomalyData, setAnomalyData] = useState(null);
    const [trendData, setTrendData] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('anomalies');
    useEffect(() => { load(); }, []);
    const load = async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const token = localStorage.getItem('patientToken');
            if (!token) { navigate('/patient/login'); return; }
            const h = { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` };
            const [aRes, tRes] = await Promise.all([
                fetch(`${PORTAL_API}/ai/vitals-anomalies`, { headers: h }),
                fetch(`${PORTAL_API}/ai/health-trends`,    { headers: h })
            ]);
            const [aData, tData] = await Promise.all([aRes.json(), tRes.json()]);
            if (!aRes.ok) throw new Error(aData.error);
            setAnomalyData(aData);
            setTrendData(tData);
        } catch { toast.error('Could not load vitals insights.'); }
        finally { setLoading(false); }
    };
    if (loading) return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
            <div className="text-center">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-blue-200 border-t-blue-600 rounded-full animate-spin mx-auto mb-3" />
                <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Analysing your vitals...</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
            <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-10">
                <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <button onClick={() => navigate('/patient/dashboard')} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
                            <ArrowLeftIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-600" />
                        </button>
                        <div>
                            <h1 className="font-bold text-gray-900">Vitals Insights</h1>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Anomaly detection and trend analysis</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <button onClick={load} className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
                        <ArrowPathIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-500" />
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-6 space-y-4">
                {}
                <div className="flex gap-2 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-1">
                    {[{ key: 'anomalies', label: 'Anomaly Alerts' }, { key: 'trends', label: 'Trend Analysis' }].map(tab => (
                        <button key={tab.key} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
                            className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
                                activeTab === tab.key ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                            }`}>
                            {tab.label}
                        </button>
                    ))}
                </div>
                {}
                {activeTab === 'anomalies' && anomalyData && (
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                        {}
                        <div className={`rounded-xl border p-4 flex items-center gap-3 ${
                            anomalyData.allClear ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200' : 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200'
                        }`}>
                            {anomalyData.allClear
                                ? <CheckCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                                : <ShieldExclamationIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0" />}
                            <div>
                                <p className={`font-semibold text-sm ${anomalyData.allClear ? 'text-emerald-800' : 'text-amber-800'}`}>
                                    {anomalyData.message}
                                </p>
                                {anomalyData.latestDate && (
                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
                                        Based on {anomalyData.recordsAnalyzed} records · Latest: {new Date(anomalyData.latestDate).toLocaleDateString()}
                                    </p>
                                )}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        {}
                        {anomalyData.latestVitals && Object.keys(anomalyData.latestVitals).length > 0 && (
                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4">
                                <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-3">Your Latest Readings</p>
                                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                                    {anomalyData.latestVitals.temperature && (
                                        <div className={`rounded-lg p-3 text-center border ${anomalyData.latestVitals.temperature > 38.5 ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-200' : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200'}`}>
                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Temperature</p>
                                            <p className={`font-bold text-base ${anomalyData.latestVitals.temperature > 38.5 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{anomalyData.latestVitals.temperature}°C</p>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                    {anomalyData.latestVitals.heartRate && (
                                        <div className={`rounded-lg p-3 text-center border ${anomalyData.latestVitals.heartRate > 100 ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-200' : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200'}`}>
                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Heart Rate</p>
                                            <p className={`font-bold text-base ${anomalyData.latestVitals.heartRate > 100 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{anomalyData.latestVitals.heartRate} bpm</p>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                    {anomalyData.latestVitals.bloodPressure?.systolic && (
                                        <div className={`rounded-lg p-3 text-center border ${anomalyData.latestVitals.bloodPressure.systolic > 140 ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-200' : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200'}`}>
                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Blood Pressure</p>
                                            <p className={`font-bold text-base ${anomalyData.latestVitals.bloodPressure.systolic > 140 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{anomalyData.latestVitals.bloodPressure.systolic}/{anomalyData.latestVitals.bloodPressure.diastolic}</p>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                    {anomalyData.latestVitals.oxygenSaturation && (
                                        <div className={`rounded-lg p-3 text-center border ${anomalyData.latestVitals.oxygenSaturation < 95 ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-200' : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200'}`}>
                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Oxygen Sat.</p>
                                            <p className={`font-bold text-base ${anomalyData.latestVitals.oxygenSaturation < 95 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{anomalyData.latestVitals.oxygenSaturation}%</p>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        )}
                        {}
                        {anomalyData.anomalies?.length > 0 && anomalyData.anomalies.map((a, i) => {
                            const s = severityStyle(a.severity);
                            return (
                                <div key={i} className={`rounded-xl border p-4 ${s.bg}`}>
                                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3 gap-3">
                                        <h3 className={`font-semibold text-sm ${s.text}`}>{a.vital}</h3>
                                        <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium flex-shrink-0 ${s.badge}`}>{a.severity}</span>
                                    </div>
                                    {a.current && a.yourAverage && (
                                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-3">
                                            <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3 text-center border border-white">
                                                <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Latest Reading</p>
                                                <p className={`font-bold text-lg ${s.text}`}>{a.current}</p>
                                            </div>
                                            <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3 text-center border border-white">
                                                <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mb-1">Your Average</p>
                                                <p className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900">{a.yourAverage}</p>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 mb-2">{a.message}</p>
                                    <div className="flex items-start gap-2 bg-white/60 rounded-lg p-3 border border-white">
                                        <InformationCircleIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                                        <p className="text-xs text-blue-700">{a.action}</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            );
                        })}
                        {anomalyData.allClear && anomalyData.hasData && (
                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-8 text-center">
                                <CheckCircleIcon className="h-10 w-10 text-emerald-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
                                <p className="font-semibold text-gray-800">All vitals look normal</p>
                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">No unusual readings compared to your personal baseline</p>
                            </div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                )}
                {}
                {activeTab === 'trends' && trendData && (
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                        {trendData.hasData ? (
                            <>
                                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4">
                                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">{trendData.summary}</p>
                                    <div className="flex gap-4 mt-2 text-xs">
                                        <span className="text-emerald-600 font-medium">{trendData.improvingCount} improving</span>
                                        <span className="text-orange-600 font-medium">{trendData.worseningCount} worsening</span>
                                        <span className="text-blue-600 font-medium">{(trendData.trends?.length || 0) - trendData.improvingCount - trendData.worseningCount} stable</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                {trendData.trends?.map((t, i) => {
                                    const ts = trendStyle(t.trend);
                                    return (
                                        <div key={i} className={`rounded-xl border p-4 ${ts.bg}`}>
                                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3 flex-wrap gap-2">
                                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                                    <span className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-700">{ts.icon}</span>
                                                    <div>
                                                        <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm">{t.vital}</p>
                                                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{t.explanation}</p>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                                    <p className="font-bold text-gray-900">{t.latestValue}</p>
                                                    <span className={`text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium ${ts.badge}`}>{t.trend}</span>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            {t.chartData?.length > 1 && (
                                                <div className="h-24 mt-2">
                                                    <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
                                                        <LineChart data={t.chartData}>
                                                            <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,0.05)" />
                                                            <XAxis dataKey="date" tick={{ fontSize: 9, fill: '#9ca3af' }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
                                                            <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 9, fill: '#9ca3af' }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} width={30} />
                                                            <Tooltip {...tooltipStyle} />
                                                            <Line type="monotone" dataKey="value" stroke={ts.line} strokeWidth={2} dot={{ r: 3, fill: '#fff', strokeWidth: 2 }} name={t.vital} />
                                                        </LineChart>
                                                    </ResponsiveContainer>
                                                </div>
                                            )}
                                            {!t.inNormalRange && (
                                                <p className="text-xs text-amber-600 mt-2 flex items-center gap-1">
                                                    <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                                                    Latest reading is outside the normal range — mention this to your doctor.
                                                </p>
                                            )}
                                        </div>
                                    );
                                })}
                            </>
                        ) : (
                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-8 text-center">
                                <HeartIcon className="h-10 w-10 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-2" />
                                <p className="font-semibold text-gray-700">Not enough data yet</p>
                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Trends appear after 2 or more visits with recorded vitals</p>
                            </div>
                        )}
                    </div>
                )}
                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4 flex items-start gap-3">
                    <InformationCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
                        Anomaly detection compares your latest readings against your own historical baseline. This is not a medical diagnosis. Always consult your doctor for medical advice.
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
export default AIVitalsInsights;
```

## National_Vitality_Eye/Client/src/pages/PatientPortal/Dashboard.jsx

```text
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
    DocumentTextIcon, HeartIcon, ArrowRightIcon, CalendarIcon,
    SparklesIcon, ExclamationTriangleIcon, ShieldCheckIcon,
    BellAlertIcon, ChartBarIcon, ArrowTrendingUpIcon,
    UserGroupIcon, ArrowPathIcon
} from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
const PORTAL_API = 'http://localhost:5000/api/patient';
const PatientDashboard = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [patient, setPatient]           = useState(null);
    const [recentRecords, setRecentRecords] = useState([]);
    const [stats, setStats]               = useState({ totalRecords: 0, lastVisitDate: null });
    const [aiSummary, setAiSummary]       = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading]           = useState(true);
    useEffect(() => {
        try { setPatient(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('patient') || '{}')); } catch {}
        load();
    }, []);
    const load = async () => {
        const token = localStorage.getItem('patientToken');
        if (!token) { navigate('/patient/login'); return; }
        const h = { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` };
        try {
            const [profileRes, recordsRes, aiRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
                fetch(`${PORTAL_API}/profile`,          { headers: h }),
                fetch(`${PORTAL_API}/records`,          { headers: h }),
                fetch(`${PORTAL_API}/ai/health-summary`,{ headers: h })
            ]);
            if (profileRes.status === 'fulfilled' && profileRes.value.ok) {
                const d = await profileRes.value.json();
                if (d.stats) setStats(d.stats);
            }
            if (recordsRes.status === 'fulfilled' && recordsRes.value.ok) {
                const d = await recordsRes.value.json();
                const recs = Array.isArray(d) ? d : (d.records || []);
                setRecentRecords(recs.slice(0, 3));
            }
            if (aiRes.status === 'fulfilled' && aiRes.value.ok) {
                setAiSummary(await aiRes.value.json());
            }
        } catch {}
        finally { setLoading(false); }
    };
    const triageStatus = patient?.clinicalProfile?.triageStatus || { priority: 'STABLE', score: 0, reasons: [] };
    const triageStyle = (p) => ({
        CRITICAL: 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border-red-500/30',
        EMERGENT: 'bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400 border-orange-500/30',
        URGENT:   'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500/30',
        STABLE:   'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30',
    }[p] || 'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400 border-gray-500/30');
    const scoreColor = (c) => ({
        green:  'text-cyber-green',
        yellow: 'text-yellow-400',
        orange: 'text-orange-400',
        red:    'text-red-400',
    }[c] || 'text-gray-400');
    const dispositionStyle = (d) => ({
        Discharged: 'bg-cyber-green/10 text-cyber-green border-cyber-green/20',
        Admitted:   'bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500/20',
        Deceased:   'bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border-red-500/20',
    }[d] || 'bg-white/5 text-gray-500 border-white/5');
    if (loading) return (
        <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
            <div className="relative">
                <div className="w-16 h-16 border-4 border-cyber-purple/20 rounded-full animate-spin border-t-cyber-purple" />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <SparklesIcon className="h-6 w-6 text-cyber-purple animate-pulse" />
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
    return (
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-8 space-y-8">
            {}
            <div className="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-r from-cyber-purple to-cyber-blue p-[1px]">
                <div className="rounded-2xl bg-brand-dark-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl p-6">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center flex-wrap gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-cyber-purple mb-1">Patient Portal</p>
                            <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-white tracking-tight">
                                Welcome back, {patient?.firstName} {patient?.lastName}
                            </h1>
                            <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mt-1">
                                {stats.lastVisitDate
                                    ? `Last visit: ${new Date(stats.lastVisitDate).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}`
                                    : 'No visits recorded yet'}
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <button onClick={load} className="p-2 rounded-xl bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 transition-all duration-300">
                            <ArrowPathIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            {}
            <div className={`relative rounded-2xl border p-6 ${triageStyle(triageStatus.priority)}`}>
                <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-6">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div className={`p-3 rounded-2xl border ${triageStyle(triageStatus.priority)} animate-pulse`}>
                            <SparklesIcon className="h-7 w-7" />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] opacity-70 mb-1">AI Clinical Assessment</p>
                            <h2 className="text-xl font-black text-white">Your Health Priority Status</h2>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div className="text-right">
                            <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Vitality Score</p>
                            <p className="text-3xl font-black text-white">{triageStatus.score || 0}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div className={`px-6 py-3 rounded-xl border font-black tracking-widest text-lg ${triageStyle(triageStatus.priority)}`}>
                            {triageStatus.priority}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                {triageStatus.reasons?.length > 0 && (
                    <div className="mt-5 pt-5 border-t border-white/10">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                            <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-4 w-4 opacity-70" />
                            <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest opacity-70">Clinical Indicators</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                            {triageStatus.reasons.map((r, i) => (
                                <span key={i} className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 border border-white/10 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-300 uppercase tracking-widest">{r}</span>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                )}
                {triageStatus.lastAssessment && (
                    <p className="mt-4 text-[9px] font-mono text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2">
                        <ShieldCheckIcon className="h-3 w-3" />
                        Last assessed: {new Date(triageStatus.lastAssessment).toLocaleString()}
                    </p>
                )}
            </div>
            {}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {[
                    { label: 'Total Records',  value: stats.totalRecords || recentRecords.length || 0, icon: DocumentTextIcon, color: 'text-cyber-purple' },
                    { label: 'Last Visit',     value: stats.lastVisitDate ? new Date(stats.lastVisitDate).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }) : 'N/A', icon: CalendarIcon, color: 'text-cyber-blue' },
                    { label: 'Portal Status',  value: 'Active', icon: ShieldCheckIcon, color: 'text-cyber-green' }
                ].map((s, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="stat-card group">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div>
                                <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 mb-1">{s.label}</p>
                                <p className="text-2xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter">{s.value}</p>
                            </div>
                            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-brand-dark-950 border border-white/5 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:border-cyber-purple/30 transition-all duration-500">
                                <s.icon className={`h-6 w-6 ${s.color}`} />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                ))}
            </div>
            {}
            {aiSummary && (
                <div className="glass-card-modern p-5 border border-white/5 flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap gap-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div className={`text-4xl font-black ${scoreColor(aiSummary.scoreColor)}`}>
                            {aiSummary.healthScore}<span className="text-sm text-gray-600 ml-1 font-bold">/100</span>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 mb-1">Health Score</p>
                            <p className="text-lg font-black text-white">{aiSummary.scoreLabel}</p>
                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
                                {aiSummary.warnings?.length > 0
                                    ? `${aiSummary.warnings.length} item${aiSummary.warnings.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} to review`
                                    : 'All clear'}
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <button
                        onClick={() => navigate('/patient/ai/health-summary')}
                        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-brand-dark-900 border border-white/5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-cyber-purple hover:border-cyber-purple/30 transition-all duration-300"
                    >
                        Full Summary <ArrowRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </button>
                </div>
            )}
            {}
            <div>
                <h2 className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-gray-500 mb-4">Your Health Records</h2>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                    {[
                        { path: '/patient/records',           icon: DocumentTextIcon,   color: 'text-cyber-purple', border: 'hover:border-cyber-purple/30', title: 'Medical Records',   desc: 'View your visit history, diagnoses, lab results, and treatment plans' },
                        { path: '/patient/vitals',            icon: HeartIcon,           color: 'text-cyber-blue',   border: 'hover:border-cyber-blue/30',   title: 'Vital Signs',       desc: 'Track your blood pressure, temperature, heart rate, and weight over time' },
                        { path: '/patient/trusted-providers', icon: UserGroupIcon,       color: 'text-cyber-green',  border: 'hover:border-cyber-green/30',  title: 'My Care Team',      desc: 'Manage which health workers can access all your records' }
                    ].map(card => (
                        <div key={card.path} onClick={() => navigate(card.path)}
                            className={`glass-card-modern p-6 border border-white/5 ${card.border} cursor-pointer group`}>
                            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-5">
                                <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-brand-dark-950 border border-white/5 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:border-cyber-purple/30 transition-all duration-500">
                                    <card.icon className={`h-6 w-6 ${card.color} group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`} />
                                </div>
                                <ArrowRightIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-700 group-hover:text-white group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-all duration-300" />
                            </div>
                            <h3 className="font-black text-white text-base mb-2">{card.title}</h3>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">{card.desc}</p>
                        </div>
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
            {}
            <div>
                <h2 className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-gray-500 mb-4">AI Health Tools</h2>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    {[
                        { path: '/patient/ai/health-summary',  icon: ChartBarIcon,        color: 'text-cyber-purple', border: 'hover:border-cyber-purple/30', title: 'Health Summary',  desc: 'AI health score and key findings' },
                        { path: '/patient/ai/vitals-insights', icon: ArrowTrendingUpIcon,  color: 'text-cyber-pink',   border: 'hover:border-cyber-pink/30',   title: 'Vitals Insights', desc: 'Anomaly alerts and trend analysis' },
                        { path: '/patient/ai/reminders',       icon: BellAlertIcon,        color: 'text-yellow-400',   border: 'hover:border-yellow-400/30',   title: 'Reminders',       desc: 'Follow-ups and medications' }
                    ].map(card => (
                        <div key={card.path} onClick={() => navigate(card.path)}
                            className={`glass-card-modern p-5 border border-white/5 ${card.border} cursor-pointer group`}>
                            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-brand-dark-950 border border-white/5 flex items-center justify-center mb-3 group-hover:border-cyber-purple/30 transition-all duration-500">
                                <card.icon className={`h-5 w-5 ${card.color} group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`} />
                            </div>
                            <p className="font-black text-white text-sm mb-1">{card.title}</p>
                            <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">{card.desc}</p>
                        </div>
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
            {}
            {recentRecords.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                        <h2 className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-gray-500">Recent Visits</h2>
                        <button onClick={() => navigate('/patient/records')} className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-cyber-purple hover:text-cyber-blue transition-colors">
                            View all →
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                        {recentRecords.map((record, idx) => (
                            <div key={idx} onClick={() => navigate('/patient/records')}
                                className="glass-card-modern p-4 border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 cursor-pointer group">
                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                                        <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-brand-dark-950 border border-white/5 flex items-center justify-center">
                                            <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-cyber-purple">#{idx + 1}</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <p className="font-bold text-white text-sm">{record.disease || record.primaryDiagnosis?.name || 'Medical Visit'}</p>
                                            <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
                                                {record.visitDate ? new Date(record.visitDate).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }) : 'Date N/A'}
                                                {record.hospital ? ` · ${record.hospital}` : ''}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                        {record.disposition && (
                                            <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border ${dispositionStyle(record.disposition)}`}>
                                                {record.disposition}
                                            </span>
                                        )}
                                        <ArrowRightIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-700 group-hover:text-white transition-colors" />
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
};
export default PatientDashboard;
```

## National_Vitality_Eye/Client/src/pages/PatientPortal/ForgotPassword.jsx

```text
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { EnvelopeIcon, ArrowLeftIcon, CheckCircleIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import axios from 'axios';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
const ForgotPassword = () => {
    const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
    const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (!email) {
            toast.error('Please enter your email');
            return;
        }
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.post('http://localhost:5000/api/patient/forgot-password', { email });
            setSubmitted(true);
            toast.success('If an account exists, a reset link has been sent');
        } catch  {
            toast.error('Something went wrong. Please try again.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };
    if (submitted) {
        return (
            <div className="min-h-screen bg-brand-dark-950 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden p-4">
                <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full pointer-events-none">
                    <div className="absolute top-[-10%] left-[-10%] w-[40%] h-[40%] bg-cyber-purple/10 blur-[120px] rounded-full animate-pulse" />
                    <div className="absolute bottom-[-10%] right-[-10%] w-[40%] h-[40%] bg-cyber-blue/10 blur-[120px] rounded-full animate-pulse delay-700" />
                </div>
                <div className="relative z-10 w-full max-w-md">
                    <div className="glass-card-modern p-10 border border-white/5 shadow-2xl text-center">
                        <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8">
                            <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-3xl bg-cyber-blue/20 blur-2xl animate-pulse" />
                            <div className="relative w-24 h-24 rounded-3xl bg-brand-dark-900 border border-cyber-blue/30 flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl">
                                <EnvelopeIcon className="h-12 w-12 text-cyber-blue" />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter mb-4 uppercase italic">Archive Sync</h1>
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 mb-8 leading-relaxed">
                            Password reset protocol initialized for identifier:<br/>
                            <span className="text-cyber-blue mt-2 block">{email}</span>
                        </p>
                        <div className="p-5 rounded-2xl bg-brand-dark-900 border border-white/5 mb-10">
                            <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] leading-relaxed">
                                VERIFY INBOX FOR ACCESS KEY RESET DE-CRYPTIONS. IF NULL, CHECK SPAM-NODES.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <Link
                            to="/patient/login"
                            className="w-full btn-primary-modern group flex items-center justify-center"
                        >
                            <span>BACK TO CORE</span>
                        </Link>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        );
    }
    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-brand-dark-950 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden p-4">
            <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full pointer-events-none">
                <div className="absolute top-[-10%] left-[-10%] w-[40%] h-[40%] bg-cyber-purple/10 blur-[120px] rounded-full animate-pulse" />
                <div className="absolute bottom-[-10%] right-[-10%] w-[40%] h-[40%] bg-cyber-blue/10 blur-[120px] rounded-full animate-pulse delay-700" />
            </div>
            <div className="relative z-10 w-full max-w-md">
                <div className="glass-card-modern p-10 border border-white/5 shadow-2xl">
                    <div className="text-center mb-10">
                        <div className="relative w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-6">
                            <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-3xl bg-cyber-purple/20 blur-2xl animate-pulse" />
                            <div className="relative w-24 h-24 rounded-3xl bg-brand-dark-900 border border-cyber-purple/30 flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl">
                                <EnvelopeIcon className="h-12 w-12 text-cyber-purple" />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter mb-2 uppercase italic">Lost Access?</h1>
                        <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-gray-500">Initiate identity recovery protocol</p>
                    </div>
                    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-8">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <label className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 ml-1">Email Identifier</label>
                            <div className="relative">
                                <EnvelopeIcon className="absolute left-5 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-500" />
                                <input
                                    type="email"
                                    value={email}
                                    onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full pl-14 pr-6 py-4 rounded-2xl bg-brand-dark-950 border border-white/5 text-white placeholder-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-cyber-purple/50 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-cyber-purple/5 transition-all duration-500"
                                    placeholder="user@health.node"
                                    required
                                />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <button
                            type="submit"
                            disabled={loading}
                            className="w-full btn-primary-modern group"
                        >
                            <span>{loading ? 'SYNCING...' : 'INITIATE RESET'}</span>
                        </button>
                        <div className="text-center pt-4">
                            <Link to="/patient/login" className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-gray-500 hover:text-cyber-purple transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                                <ArrowLeftIcon className="h-3 w-3" />
                                RETURN_TO_CORE
                            </Link>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
export default ForgotPassword;
```

## National_Vitality_Eye/Client/src/pages/PatientPortal/Login.jsx

```text
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { EnvelopeIcon, LockClosedIcon, EyeIcon, EyeSlashIcon, UserIcon, PhoneIcon, HeartIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import axios from 'axios';
const PatientLogin = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);
    const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [loginData, setLoginData] = useState({ email: '', password: '' });
    const [registerData, setRegisterData] = useState({
        nationalId: '', email: '', phoneNumber: '', password: '', confirmPassword: '', consent: false
    });
    const handleLogin = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (!loginData.email || !loginData.password) { toast.error('Please fill in all fields'); return; }
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const res = await axios.post('http://localhost:5000/api/patient/login', loginData);
            localStorage.setItem('patientToken', res.data.token);
            localStorage.setItem('patient', JSON.stringify(res.data.patient || res.data.user));
            toast.success('Welcome back!');
            navigate('/patient/dashboard');
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.error || 'Login failed. Please try again.');
        } finally { setLoading(false); }
    };
    const handleRegister = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (!registerData.nationalId) { toast.error('National ID is required'); return; }
        if (!registerData.email) { toast.error('Email is required'); return; }
        if (registerData.password.length < 8) { toast.error('Password must be at least 8 characters'); return; }
        if (registerData.password !== registerData.confirmPassword) { toast.error('Passwords do not match'); return; }
        if (!registerData.consent) { toast.error('You must consent to data processing'); return; }
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const res = await axios.post('http://localhost:5000/api/patient/register', {
                nationalId: registerData.nationalId,
                email: registerData.email,
                phoneNumber: registerData.phoneNumber,
                password: registerData.password,
                consent: 'true'
            });
            toast.success(res.data.message || 'Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.');
            setRegisterData({ nationalId: '', email: '', phoneNumber: '', password: '', confirmPassword: '', consent: false });
            setIsLogin(true);
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.error || 'Registration failed. Please try again.');
        } finally { setLoading(false); }
    };
    const inputClass = "w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent text-sm bg-white";
    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
            <div className="w-full max-w-md">
                {}
                <div className="text-center mb-8">
                    <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 shadow-lg">
                        <HeartIcon className="h-7 w-7 text-white" />
                    </div>
                    <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Patient Portal</h1>
                    <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1">Access your health records securely</p>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
                    {}
                    <div className="flex rounded-xl bg-gray-100 p-1 mb-6">
                        <button
                            onClick={() => setIsLogin(true)}
                            className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
                                isLogin ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
                            }`}
                        >
                            Sign In
                        </button>
                        <button
                            onClick={() => setIsLogin(false)}
                            className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
                                !isLogin ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
                            }`}
                        >
                            Register
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    {}
                    {isLogin ? (
                        <form onSubmit={handleLogin} className="space-y-4">
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5">Email Address</label>
                                <div className="relative">
                                    <EnvelopeIcon className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                                    <input type="email" value={loginData.email}
                                        onChange={e => setLoginData({ ...loginData, email: e.target.value })}
                                        className={inputClass} placeholder="you@example.com" required />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5">Password</label>
                                <div className="relative">
                                    <LockClosedIcon className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                                    <input type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'} value={loginData.password}
                                        onChange={e => setLoginData({ ...loginData, password: e.target.value })}
                                        className={`${inputClass} pr-12`} placeholder="••••••••" required />
                                    <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                                        className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                                        {showPassword ? <EyeSlashIcon className="h-5 w-5" /> : <EyeIcon className="h-5 w-5" />}
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className="text-right">
                                <Link to="/patient/forgot-password" className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700">
                                    Forgot password?
                                </Link>
                            </div>
                            <button type="submit" disabled={loading}
                                className="w-full py-3 rounded-xl bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 text-sm">
                                {loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In'}
                            </button>
                        </form>
                    ) : (
                        <form onSubmit={handleRegister} className="space-y-4">
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5">National ID *</label>
                                <div className="relative">
                                    <UserIcon className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                                    <input type="text" value={registerData.nationalId}
                                        onChange={e => setRegisterData({ ...registerData, nationalId: e.target.value })}
                                        className={inputClass} placeholder="63-123456-A12" required />
                                </div>
                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Must match your hospital records</p>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5">Email Address *</label>
                                <div className="relative">
                                    <EnvelopeIcon className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
                                    <input type="email" value={registerData.email}
                                        onChange={e => setRegisterData({ ...registerData, email: e.target.value })}
                                        className={inputClass} placeholder="you@example.com" required />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5">Phone Number</label>
                                <div className="relative">
```
